# GitHub “About” (copy into the repository description)

Use **Settings → General → About → Description** (or `gh repo edit`).

**Short (≤350 characters recommended):**

> Build road graphs (nodes/edges + centerline polylines) from trajectory CSV. Includes JSON schema validation, SVG/`visualize`, interactive **GitHub Pages** viewer, and OSM GPS sample fetch. LiDAR/camera/Lanelet2 are stubbed for extension.

**Topics to add:** `python`, `road-graph`, `trajectory`, `mapping`, `openstreetmap`, `gis`, `autonomous-driving`

**Website (optional):** your GitHub Pages URL, e.g. `https://<user>.github.io/roadgraph_builder/`
